posts.author: pgharkness (Philippa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The board footer is a great addition to a board and often requested. It is a big limitation that not only each account need to turn it on separately, but it is only available in labs which is limited to admin users. This is a request open this up to all account types.

What are you trying to achieve

This would make the function more accessible for all people within a company.
